extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
1f670714-7d38-4056-8cd1-011d02172078.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
1f670714-7d38-4056-8cd1-011d02172078.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
1f670714-7d38-4056-8cd1-011d02172078.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
1f670714-7d38-4056-8cd1-011d02172078.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
439feda3-fb35-4458-9473-f6da659dafb4.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
439feda3-fb35-4458-9473-f6da659dafb4.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
439feda3-fb35-4458-9473-f6da659dafb4.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
439feda3-fb35-4458-9473-f6da659dafb4.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
439feda3-fb35-4458-9473-f6da659dafb4.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
a9ece68a-7850-418c-8955-7afe1cc5f6ee.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
a9ece68a-7850-418c-8955-7afe1cc5f6ee.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
a9ece68a-7850-418c-8955-7afe1cc5f6ee.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
a9ece68a-7850-418c-8955-7afe1cc5f6ee.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

0da2e04c-2a1e-4713-bf0e-4760f9ab88a1.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
0da2e04c-2a1e-4713-bf0e-4760f9ab88a1.label: counterfactual
0da2e04c-2a1e-4713-bf0e-4760f9ab88a1.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
0da2e04c-2a1e-4713-bf0e-4760f9ab88a1.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
0da2e04c-2a1e-4713-bf0e-4760f9ab88a1.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
0da2e04c-2a1e-4713-bf0e-4760f9ab88a1.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

caveats.detail: Proxy selection may dominate the result.

c7110973-a005-4d1d-b96b-361d645db0a1.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
c7110973-a005-4d1d-b96b-361d645db0a1.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
c7110973-a005-4d1d-b96b-361d645db0a1.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
c7110973-a005-4d1d-b96b-361d645db0a1.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
